biological_replicate: Male 8 weeks old C57/B6j mice (n=5 per group) were used in this study.
technical_replicate: Each sample was digested and run in triplicate injections.
experimental_design: in vitro and in vivo study
Trametinib, a clinically-approved MEK1/2 inhibitor... suppresses Salmonella infection both in vitro and in vivo.
factor_value: Trametinib, a clinically-approved MEK1/2 inhibitor... suppresses Salmonella infection.
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
